creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
> It look good, let's go on.
> Thank you for your cooperation.

Please note we are in feature freeze, so unless 9.1 is released there
in no chance to commit the diff, specialty since I want to enable
crypto per default.

For apr-util-1.5.x we have to do an expression run, this mean test
builds for every port (at last every port which depends direct or
indirect on apr on several cpu archs and releases).

So it can take a while.

--
Regards,
olli
